subcodes.first_line: This binding and irrevocable decree hath, in this very hour, been manifested from the precincts of the Most Great Prison: Bear ye witness that ye belong unto God, without doubt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این حکم محکم مبرم در این حین از شطر سجن اعظم ظاهر نشهد انکم کنتم لله و لا شک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @praise and encouragement, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
